title: Multi‑Brand Gift Card Acceptance

narrative: The user is looking for actionable information on the acceptance network, supported merchant categories, geographical coverage, online versus in‑store usage rules, and any limits such as expiration dates or cumulative spending caps. Relevant content must describe where and how the card can be used, including specific retailers or platforms, functional constraints, and the conditions that could affect eligibility for redemption.

title: Lamb Tajine Variants
description: What are the different ingredient combinations and cooking methods for lamb tajine that balance flavor and health considerations?
narrative: The user wants to go beyond a single recipe, exploring how lamb tajine can be adapted with various vegetables, fruits, spices, and cooking techniques while keeping the dish healthy or suitable for dietary restrictions. Relevance criterias: documents that describe alternative lamb tajine recipes (including ingredient substitutions, spice blends like ras‐el‑hanout, fruit additions such as dates or figs), detail cooking methods (steaming, slow‑cooking, quick‑sauté), discuss nutritional aspects (caloric values, fat content, protein), and provide user review insights on adjustments that improve taste or health. Non‑relevant content includes generic cooking tips, unrelated lamb dishes, or promotional material that does not contribute to recipe variation or health evaluation.

title: Low‑Mileage Lotus Elise
description: How can I find a pre‑owned Lotus Elise with under 50,000 km that fits a €35,000 budget?
narrative: The user is specifically interested in a low‑mileage Lotus Elise, preferring models that have traveled less than 50,000 km and are priced no higher than €35,000. Relevance requires listings within those mileage and price constraints, accurate condition reports, and verified ownership histories. Additional helpful information such as dealer location, warranty options, and maintenance records is desirable.

title: Mushroom Veal Paupiettes
description: What is the quickest veal paupiettes recipe that includes mushrooms and can be cooked in under 30 minutes?
narrative: The user needs a recipe that is fast to prepare (preparation and cooking below 30 minutes), uses veal paupiettes rolled with mushroom filling, and does not rely on heavy cream or cheese. They want a straightforward, savory sauce, ideally using white wine or broth, suitable for a dinner party or quick weekday meal. Relevance criteria include recipes with preparation time ≤ 30 min, mention of mushrooms in the stuffing or sauce, absence of dairy products like cream or cheese, and clear step‑by‑step instructions.

title: Child Car Sun Protection
description: How can I best shield my baby from UV rays while driving or parking the car?
narrative: I have a newborn and I want to keep my baby safe from harmful sun exposure inside the car. I’m looking for practical options—such as rear sun visors, electrostatic films, or solar‑tinted panels— that do not compromise visibility, are easy to install, and offer UV protection for the interior and the baby. Relevant answers should discuss types of visors, installation methods, legal constraints on tint, and the effectiveness of these products at blocking UV while maintaining safe driving conditions.

title: Petit Bateau Store Search
description: I want to locate a Petit Bateau store near me that carries women’s swimwear and understand its opening hours and ordering options.

title: Reloading ARE Rights

Relevant documents include the descriptions of the ARE qualifying period, the conditions for reloading, the procedure for the right of option, and examples of how benefits adjust when previous entitlements are exhausted or combined with new work earnings.

title: Silver Gelatin History
description: I want a detailed technical overview of the silver gelatin printing process introduced in the late 19th century, including its chemical formulation, development steps, major inventors, and how the process evolved into the 20th century.
narrative: The user seeks in-depth historical and technical information about the silver gelatin printing process (aristotype, silver gelatin bromide, etc.) used in the 19th and early 20th centuries. Relevance should include the chemical composition of emulsions, procedures for sensitizing paper, exposure, development, fixation, and washing, as well as the contributions of key figures such as Maddox, Bennett, Lumière, Eastman, and others. Existing knowledge of silver halide chemistry, ground glass sensitivity, record‑keeping practices of the era, and transition to newer film types are desired."}
